problem_statement:
inclusiveDayCount is off by one

`inclusiveDayCount(start, end)` should return the number of whole days in the INCLUSIVE range [start, end], but it returns one too few.

Example:
- `inclusiveDayCount(2026-01-01, 2026-01-01)` returns 0, should be 1.
- `inclusiveDayCount(2026-01-01, 2026-01-03)` returns 2, should be 3.

The fix is in `src/date-range.ts`. `eachDay` already enumerates the inclusive range correctly, so don't change it.

issue.title: inclusiveDayCount is off by one
issue.body: `inclusiveDayCount(start, end)` should count days in the INCLUSIVE range but returns one too few. `inclusiveDayCount(2026-01-01, 2026-01-01)` returns 0 (should be 1). The bug is in `src/date-range.ts`.

FAIL_TO_PASS: inclusive single day counts as one
inclusive three day span counts as three
PASS_TO_PASS: eachDay still lists every inclusive day
